tasks.title: Account model + roles
acceptance: WHEN a user registers THEN the system SHALL create an Account with role renter by default

tasks.title: Email/password + Google OAuth signup
acceptance: WHEN a user registers with a valid email and password THEN the system SHALL create an unverified Account and send a verification email
WHEN Google OAuth completes with a verified email matching an existing Account THEN the system SHALL link not duplicate

tasks.title: Escrow balance + monthly payout
acceptance: WHEN a monthly charge succeeds THEN the system SHALL credit Escrow and record the owner claimable minus Commission
WHEN a payout run executes THEN the system SHALL transfer each owner Payout and mark it paid
